title: The Optimizer Race
tagline: Why we use Adam instead of pure Gradient Descent
summary: Drop a starting point on any of four loss landscapes (ravine, saddle, plateau, Rosenbrock) and watch SGD, Momentum, and Adam race to the minimum with live step counters, loss scoreboards, and log-scale loss curves.
highlights: Switch between four diagnostic landscapes that each stress a different optimizer weakness.
Compare SGD, Momentum, and Adam side-by-side with live step counts and log-scale loss curves.
Tune the learning rate and max steps to see when each method diverges or stalls.
